top_signals.title: US Charges Executives and Firms Over Container Cartel
top_signals.summary: The United States has charged seven Chinese executives and four of the world's largest shipping container companies with conspiring to restrict supply, raising the price of containers during the COVID pandemic, Department of Justice officials…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Trump's past tax returns get protection from IRS enforcement under 'lawfare' fund settlement
top_signals.summary: President Trump agreed to drop his lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for a fund that can compensate allies who were targeted under the Biden administration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
